info.name: Employee Department Project API
info.description: CRUD APIs for Auth, Employee, Department, Project, Task, Attendance, Employee Profile and Payroll Payments modules. Responses use ApiResponse envelope and delete APIs require confirm=true.

item.name: Get Task By Id - Not Found (Expected 404)
Update Task - Assigned Employee Not Found (Expected 404)
Create Attendance - Duplicate For Same Date (Expected 409)
Create Attendance - Second Record (For Update Duplicate Scenario)
Get Attendance By Id - Not Found (Expected 404)
